description: PPP should inspect before patching and define direct proof for a small validation bug.

weak: Starts patching immediately without showing that it inspected the relevant validation path.
Falls back to generic confidence language or broad checks instead of a direct validation proof.
good: Inspects first, keeps the change tightly scoped, and chooses a direct proof for the whitespace validation behavior.
Keeps the work reviewable and PR-oriented rather than turning a small bug into a refactor.
excellent: Anchors the proof to the exact validation behavior and the closest existing test pattern in the repo.
Shows the smallest safe change, the strongest direct proof, and the expected review handoff with almost no wasted motion.

criteria.name: inspect-relevant-validation-area
criteria.description: Inspects or reviews the relevant validation area before editing.

criteria.name: tie-proof-to-behaviour
criteria.description: Proof is tied to the validation behaviour rather than generic checks.

criteria.name: small-safe-scope
criteria.description: Frames the work as a small safe change.

criteria.name: pr-review-handoff
criteria.description: Keeps review or PR handoff visible.

criteria.name: no-broad-proof-substitute
criteria.description: Penalize using broad generic checks as the main proof.
